arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca gives answer on if Deivid Washington could now play up front for Chelsea after Nicolas Jackson injury news
Brighton vs Chelsea – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Brighton welcome Chelsea to the AMEX Stadium for the second time in six days this evening. Fabian Hurzeler’s side eliminated Chelsea from the FA Cup last weekend with Kaoru Mitoma scoring the winner in a 2-1 victory. The Seagulls host Chelsea again on Valentine’s Day, looking to strengthen their challenge for European football. Brighton are […] The post Brighton vs Chelsea – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans FUME over new Enzo Maresca comments as they insist the Italian boss is 'not fit to coach' Blues ahead of clash with Brighton
arts.sum: The Blues take on Brighton once again on Friday and the Italian has insisted his side is not ready to compete on all fronts after their exit from the FA Cup last weekend.

arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Brighton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea make an immediate return to Brighton just six days on from their FA Cup exit at the AMEX Stadium. The teams meet again in the Premier League on Friday night with Chelsea hoping to consolidate their place in the top four. Enzo Maresca has insisted Champions League qualification is not essential, though a run […] The post Chelsea XI vs Brighton – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Maresca remains positive but Chelsea need Brighton revenge as doubts grow
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca is choosing to remain positive. After Saturday's FA Cup exit at the hands of Brighton - something the head coach called "a shame" - he preferred to look on the bright side.

arts.ttl: Report: The reason Chelsea had to make 'quick' decision on whether to sign Mathis Amougou in January explained
arts.sum: It came as a surprise to many fans when Chelsea completed the signing of Mathis Amougou from Saint-Etienne on deadline day of the recent January...

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Brighton: Premier League
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca will have to find alternatives at striker given the injuries to Nicolas Jackson and Marc Guiu if Chelsea are to continue in the Premier League's top four.

arts.ttl: 'I'm happy' – Fabian Hurzeler makes Marc Cucurella and Robert Sanchez claim after Amex Stadium chants
arts.sum: Chelsea’s ex-Brighton player could be in for another rough ride at the Amex Stadium
West Ham boss Graham Potter says he "wasn't in a good place" after he was sacked by Chelsea but that it made him a "stronger person".

arts.ttl: Why Chelsea should sign Marc Guehi over £50m Premier League target who has outperformed him this season - opinion
arts.sum: He'll bring more to the squad.
